image:image.image:title: Dashboard de projetos do FlowProject
image:image.image:caption: Painel de projetos com agenda, OS para aprovar e mural de lembretes.

image:image.image:title: Kanban de projetos do FlowProject
image:image.image:caption: Visao Kanban para acompanhar status, prioridades, horas e custos dos projetos.

image:image.image:title: Workspace de projetos do FlowProject
image:image.image:caption: Workspace com horas, despesas, margem, tarefas, Gantt e status reports automaticos.

image:image.image:title: Gestao de recursos do FlowProject
image:image.image:caption: Tela de recursos com equipes, skills, valor hora, agenda, feedback e status.
